intro: Claude Code can be used with your Claude subscription or billed based on API usage through your Console account.
loginPrompt: How do you want to log in?

claudeAi.label: Claude.ai Subscription
claudeAi.description: Use your Claude Pro, Team, or Enterprise subscription

console.label: Anthropic Console
console.description: Pay for API usage through your Console account

providers.label: Bedrock, Foundry, or Vertex
providers.description: Instructions on how to use API keys or third-party providers.

codeInput.title: Paste the code from your browser
codeInput.description: After signing in, your browser shows a code. Paste it here to finish logging in.

urlModal.title: Sign in to Claude
urlModal.description: Claude is opening your browser to sign in. If it didn't open automatically, use the button below.
urlModal.revealCode: Received a code in your browser? Enter it
